final_round_sampled_pass_curve.definition: For each t, for each origin we sample t distinct genids (without replacement) using a deterministic RNG seeded by (seed, t). Success if any sampled genid is correct by max_round. If an origin has < t genids, we sample all of them (so it matches pass@k for that origin).

notes.filtering: Benchmark metrics count only origins where the dataset entry has is_formalized == 'True'. For custom/demo inputs with no origins present in the bundled datasets, all observed origins are counted.
notes.denominator: For final_proof_* directories, origins from the matched source dataset are included even when answer construction/refutation prevented final prover generation; these origins count as unsolved.
notes.pass@k_at_round_r: Cumulative through round r: for each origin, success if ANY of its k genids is correct by round r.
notes.pass@1_at_round_r: Simulated pass@1 with fixed seed: for each origin, sample 1 genid once (at start) and success if that sampled genid is correct by round r.
notes.key_fix: Correction-round compilation IDs are remapped to canonical generation_id using full_records_corr{r}.json id_maps when available.
